title: Fix sqlite3_analyzer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32), comments Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (name, age, comments) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'User comment 1');
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT name, age, COALESCE(comments, 'No comments') AS user_comments FROM users WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE users UPDATE comments = 'Updated comment' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Missing User Comments tag in sqlite3_analyzer
